feat.name: Into the Labyrinth
feat.text: Calling on your connection to minotaurs of myth, you shunt an enemy into a complex maze full of puzzles of your own devising. Once per day, you can cast *quandary* as an 8th-rank occult innate spell, which takes the form of a labyrinth instead of a puzzle room. Targets cannot attempt to use Occultism to escape the spell (as normal for *quandary*), but they can use Survival to find their way through the labyrinth's corridors.

traits.name: Minotaur
traits.text: Minotaurs are horned, bovine humanoids with a mastery of mazes and puzzles.
